description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a striking black and white color palette and a flat roof. The front facade features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. Vertical black slats provide privacy and a bold architectural accent, while wooden balconies and staircases add warmth and texture. The house includes two visible balconies with potted plants, and a small entry stairway leading to the main door. Two cars are parked in front, suggesting a driveway or parking area integrated into the design. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story black and white house with large windows, wooden balconies, and bold vertical slats. The design features a flat roof and integrated parking in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two parked cars, large glass windows, wooden balconies, and vertical black slats.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, vertical slats, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid white wall with minimal window openings and a flat roof.
description_view_3: Side view with black exterior, two large windows, visible balconies, and the cars parked in front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small staircase, wooden steps, and a simple door flanked by vertical black slats and minimal decorative elements.
